title: The Serpent�s Legacy.
content:
An apple caused man�s fall, as some believe;
    But that old Snake, malevolently wise,
    A deadlier snare set when he left to Eve
    His tongue of honey and mesmeric eyes.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Victor James Daley, titled "The Serpent�s Legacy.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
